creator: alexander.shevchenko@itv.ru
text:
We have Tyan Board - H2000M S3992G3NR with 2xDual-Core AMD Opteron(tm)
Processor 2214, 4 x 2GB Kingston KVR667D2D4P5/2G , one IDE MAXTOR
STM380215A/3.AAD drive, 3Ware 9650SE-12M+BBU-MODULE-03 with 3 units:
RAID5(4xHDD 500 Gb SATA-II 300 Seagate Barracuda ES <3500630NS>),
RAID0(3xHDD 320 Gb SATA-II 300 Western Digital <3200JS>), SPARE(HDD 500 Gb
SATA-II 300 Seagate Barracuda ES <3500630NS>)
Running well as a fileserver on 6.3-PRERELEASE SMP. Some stats may be found
here:
http://powernet.bmstu.ru/cacti/graph_view.php?action=preview&host_id=11

--
Regards,
Alexander E. Shevchenko
